description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Istio service mesh using standard Prometheus metrics. Covers traffic overview, latency percentiles, error rates, TCP connections, and control plane health.
title: Istio Service Mesh — Prometheus

widgets.description: Total number of requests across the entire Istio mesh in the selected time range.
widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Current requests per second across the entire Istio mesh.
widgets.title: Request Rate (RPS)

widgets.description: Percentage of requests returning HTTP 5xx status codes across the mesh.
widgets.title: Global Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: 99th percentile request duration across the entire mesh.
widgets.title: P99 Latency (ms)

widgets.description: Percentage of requests that returned a non-5xx response code.
widgets.title: Success Rate (%)

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by 2xx, 3xx, 4xx, and 5xx response class.
widgets.title: RPS by Response Class

widgets.description: Inbound requests per second for each destination service in the mesh.
widgets.title: Request Rate by Destination Service

widgets.description: Number of active open TCP connections per destination workload.
widgets.title: Active TCP Connections

widgets.description: Rate of bytes sent across TCP connections per destination service.
widgets.title: TCP Bytes Sent

widgets.description: Rate of bytes received across TCP connections per destination service.
widgets.title: TCP Bytes Received

widgets.description: Median (50th percentile) request latency per destination service.
widgets.title: P50 Latency by Service (ms)

widgets.description: 95th percentile request latency per destination service.
widgets.title: P95 Latency by Service (ms)

widgets.description: 99th percentile request latency per destination service — highlights tail latency outliers.
widgets.title: P99 Latency by Service (ms)

widgets.description: Total request throughput broken down by source and destination service pair.
widgets.title: Request Throughput by Service

widgets.description: Rate of client-side (4xx) errors per destination service.
widgets.title: HTTP 4xx Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Rate of server-side (5xx) errors per destination service — indicates reliability issues.
widgets.title: HTTP 5xx Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Rate of non-zero gRPC status codes (errors) per destination service.
widgets.title: gRPC Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Total failed request rate (4xx + 5xx) broken down by source workload.
widgets.title: Failed Requests by Source Workload

widgets.description: Rate of XDS configuration pushes from Pilot (istiod) to Envoy proxies.
widgets.title: Pilot XDS Push Rate

widgets.description: Number of Envoy proxies that are in-sync (not stale) with the control plane config.
widgets.title: Envoy Proxy Config Sync Status

widgets.description: Rate of XDS push errors from Pilot — high values indicate control plane instability.
widgets.title: Pilot XDS Push Errors

widgets.description: P99 latency for Pilot to push updated configuration to Envoy proxies.
widgets.title: Pilot Config Push Latency (s)
